title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at CMA CGM India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at CMA CGM India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the CMA CGM India family as a Distribution Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CMA CGM India:
CMA CGM India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMA CGM India!
